boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?

final_answer: Action may not proceed. CLOSE-XOR-078 covers batch X-79 while release targets X-78. Policy STD-XOR-078-P requires deviation closure to match batch, assay, criterion and date exactly. Visible deviation remains open. Source boundary is not closed. Escalate for defect resolution before any release decision.
